summary: Updated Purpose line per WEBHOOK-R1. Added Section 4 documenting pipeline-started, step-completed, pipeline-completed events with exact JSON payloads from spec §4.3-4.5, run_id format {issue_id}_{YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ}, canonical stage names, strict state-commit fire ordering (WEBHOOK-R2..R4), no step-skipped note (WEBHOOK-R7), advisory curl pattern inherited from Section 3, On events filter with new tokens, and backward-compatibility clause (WEBHOOK-R8).
